name: @tailwind-styled/plugin-registry
description: Plugin discovery and install helper for the tailwind-styled v5 ecosystem

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --out-dir dist --clean --external typescript
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --out-dir dist --watch --external typescript
